compiled_state.title: Remove TK variable and v2 code paths from validate-phase.sh and agent-batch-lifecycle.sh
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## TDD Requirement

Depends on bff3-b98e (RED test task). The RED tests must be written and confirmed failing before this implementation task begins.

Specific failing tests to make GREEN:
- test_validate_phase_no_TK_variable (in tests/scripts/test-validate-phase-v2-removal.sh)
- test_validate_phase_no_tk_ready_call
- test_validate_phase_no_tk_blocked_call
- test_agent_batch_no_TK_variable
- test_agent_batch_no_TICKETS_DIR_scan
- test_agent_batch_lock_acquire_uses_ticket_cli

## Implementation Steps

### validate-phase.sh
1. Remove TK variable assignment (line 23): `TK="${TK:-$SCRIPT_DIR/tk}"`
2. In phase_full() (lines 343-345): Replace:
   `bugs=$( { "$TK" ready 2>/dev/null; "$TK" blocked 2>/dev/null; } | grep -i '\[.*bug.*\]' || echo "")`
   With:
   `bugs=$("$TICKET_CMD" list 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; tickets=json.load(sys.stdin); print('\n'.join(t['ticket_id']+' '+t.get('title','') for t in tickets if t.get('ticket_type')=='bug' and t.get('status') in ('open','in_progress')))" || echo "")`
   where TICKET_CMD is resolved from SCRIPT_DIR/ticket
3. Add TICKET_CMD resolution near top of script (after REPO_ROOT):
   `TICKET_CMD="${TICKET_CMD:-$SCRIPT_DIR/ticket}"`

### agent-batch-lifecycle.sh
1. Remove TK variable (line 28): `TK="${TK:-$SCRIPT_DIR/tk}"`
2. Add TICKET_CMD resolution: `TICKET_CMD="${TICKET_CMD:-$SCRIPT_DIR/ticket}"`
3. In cmd_lock_acquire(): Replace TICKETS_DIR file scan with ticket list + JSON parsing to find in_progress lock tickets
4. Replace all "$TK" show calls with "$TICKET_CMD" show
5. Replace "$TK" create with "$TICKET_CMD" create (note argument order difference: ticket create task "<title>" vs tk create "<title>" -t task)
6. Replace "$TK" status with "$TICKET_CMD" transition (argument order: ticket transition <id> <from> <to>)
7. Replace "$TK" add-note with "$TICKET_CMD" comment
8. Replace "$TK" close with "$TICKET_CMD" transition <id> <current_status> closed
9. Remove TICKETS_DIR-based file scanning in cmd_lock_acquire() and cmd_lock_status() — replace with ticket list JSON query
10. Update comments mentioning 'tk' to mention 'ticket CLI'

## Key Argument Differences (tk → ticket)
- tk create "<title>" -t task -p 0 → ticket create task "<title>" --priority 0
- tk status <id> in_progress → ticket transition <id> open in_progress
- tk add-note <id> "msg" → ticket comment <id> "msg"
- tk close <id> → ticket transition <id> in_progress closed
- tk show <id> → ticket show <id>

## Files Modified
- plugins/dso/scripts/validate-phase.sh (Edit)
- plugins/dso/scripts/agent-batch-lifecycle.sh (Edit)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] No TK= variable in validate-phase.sh
  Verify: ! grep -q '^TK=' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate-phase.sh
- [ ] No '$TK' calls in validate-phase.sh
  Verify: ! grep -q '"$TK"' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate-phase.sh
- [ ] No TK= variable in agent-batch-lifecycle.sh
  Verify: ! grep -q '^TK=' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/agent-batch-lifecycle.sh
- [ ] No TICKETS_DIR file scan in agent-batch-lifecycle.sh
  Verify: ! grep -q 'find "$TICKETS_DIR"' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/agent-batch-lifecycle.sh
- [ ] RED tests from bff3-b98e now pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-validate-phase-v2-removal.sh
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
GAP ANALYSIS AC AMENDMENT: When replacing '$TK status <id> in_progress' in agent-batch-lifecycle.sh, the ticket transition command requires knowing the CURRENT status. Do NOT assume the ticket is in 'open' status. Use 'ticket show <id> | python3 -c ...' to read current status first, then call 'ticket transition <id> <current> in_progress'. Add this AC criterion:
- [ ] Lock ticket status transition reads current status before transitioning (not hardcoded to 'open')
  Verify: grep -A5 'ticket transition' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/agent-batch-lifecycle.sh | grep -q 'ticket show\|current\|status'
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written (RED tests exist from bff3-b98e) ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
